reviews.comment:
45' para cargar. Una vergüenza un solo empleado. Pobre pibe que hace lo que puede, son unos sin vergüenzas.

(Translated by Google)
45 minutes to load. It's a disgrace, just one employee. Poor kid doing his best, they're shameless.

reviews.comment:
Lo que no me gustó es que hay que hacer cola en la calle, asi vallas a cargar nafta en moto :(

(Translated by Google)
What I didn't like is that you have to queue in the street, even if you're going to fill up your motorcycle with gas :(

reviews.comment:
hay que hacer una fila de al menos 2 cuadras para poder cargar. en mi caso uso diésel común y nunca tienen.

(Translated by Google)
You have to wait in line for at least two blocks to get gas. In my case, I use regular diesel and they never have any.

Well, although every time I went there was always a line.

reviews.comment:
Martes del finde largo de carnaval 2023, antes del mediodia, nos devolvieron un iphone 13 que mi mujer se habia olvidado en el mostrador cuando fue a comprar. No queria demorar la fila gigante que habia para cargar y no entré a agradecer, asi que gracias por el gesto de honestidad.

(Translated by Google)
On Tuesday of the 2023 Carnival long weekend, before noon, they returned an iPhone 13 that my wife had left on the counter when she went shopping. I didn't want to slow down the huge line for charging and didn't go in to thank them, so thank you for the honesty.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoNjRpeTNRRRAB
